C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc libimgui_lib.a "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.obj"
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe libimgui_lib.a
